english.headline: Off the Bench and Into the Fight
english.commentator: Five from five for Hammond Park, and number 13 had a big hand in this one even if the scoreboard won't show it! Alek started on the bench against Hammond Park Green, but the moment he came on in the second quarter the energy lifted — and what a contribution it was. Six tackles from six attempts — that's perfect, not a single one missed — plus eight strong disposals from ten. He didn't need to kick a goal today; his job was to win the ball back and keep it moving, and he did it all game long. The Blues got home 51 to 40 in a real arm-wrestle, and Alek's pressure was right at the heart of it. That's the unselfish, team-first stuff that wins games, number 13 — outstanding work!
